title: Converting JSON to CSV
scenario: Write a prompt to convert a complex JSON dataset into a CSV file, where each JSON object should be represented as a separate CSV row.

evaluationCriteria.description: The code adheres to the specified programming language and library constraints.
The code accurately converts the JSON dataset into a CSV file, where each JSON object is represented as a separate CSV row.
The code is well-structured, readable, and follows standard Python coding practices.
